Full job description
Business Development Lead

Salary: Circa £40,000- 45,000 per year plus uncapped bonus

Job Type: Full-time Location: United Kingdom Work Location: Remote

About Us

Projecting Success is a specialist organisation transforming how major projects are delivered through data, AI, and advanced analytics. We work with employers across infrastructure, defence, construction, and technology to improve project outcomes, build data capability, and develop future-ready teams.

Our work spans consultancy, apprenticeship delivery, and strategic partnerships, placing us at the leading edge of a fast-growing and highly specialised market. As we scale, we are investing in commercial capability to support sustainable growth and the development of new revenue streams.

The Role

This role is designed for someone already in or ready to take the next step in their business development career, moving from individual sales performance into a broader commercial leadership position.

As Business Development Manager, you will play a key role in driving sustainable growth across our apprenticeship provision, consultancy services, and data-led project delivery offerings. You will be responsible for originating new opportunities, converting pipeline into revenue, and ensuring consistent commercial performance across your portfolio.

Alongside your own business development activity, you will lead and build a small team of account managers, helping them to develop their commercial capability, strengthen client relationships, and consistently deliver against targets.

You will bring an existing professional network and the confidence to open doors, while continuing to develop the strategic skills required to identify new markets, shape propositions, and influence the organisation’s growth strategy.

This is an opportunity for a commercially minded professional who enjoys both winning new business and developing people, and who is looking to grow into a more senior commercial leadership role over time.

Key Responsibilities

· Take ownership of business development activity across Apprenticeships, Learning and Development and capability-building programmes.

· Proactively generate new opportunities through personal networks, market engagement, and targeted outreach.

· Develop and manage a strong pipeline of qualified opportunities, from first contact through to close.

· Work with senior stakeholders to understand organisational challenges and position tailored solutions.

· Support the development of new propositions and routes to market, contributing ideas and insight to leadership discussions.

· Lead client conversations, proposal development, and commercial negotiations with increasing autonomy.

· Represent Projecting Success at client meetings, events, and partnership discussions.

· Collaborate with Delivery, Operations, and Leadership teams to ensure accurate scoping and smooth onboarding.

· Maintain high standards of CRM discipline, forecasting, and performance reporting.

· Track market trends, competitor activity, and emerging opportunities to inform commercial decisions.

About You

Essential

· Experience in a business development, sales, or partnerships role within, learning and development, education, consultancy, or B2B professional services.

· A demonstrable track record of winning new business and developing client relationships.

· An existing professional network that can be activated to generate opportunities.

· Confidence engaging with senior stakeholders and decision-makers.

· Strong commercial awareness and the ability to articulate value clearly.

· Highly organised, with good pipeline management and follow-through.

· Interest in, and ability to learn, technical concepts relating to data, analytics, and AI.

· Motivated, proactive, and comfortable working remotely with a high degree of trust.

Desirable

· Experience selling apprenticeship programmes or workforce development solutions.

· Understanding of DFE funding rules and employer engagement models.

· Exposure to major projects, project delivery, or project controls environments.

· Familiarity with data analytics or AI-enabled services.

What We Offer

· Competitive salary with uncapped bonus

· A genuine step-up opportunity with increased autonomy, influence, and visibility.

· Exposure to strategic decision-making and commercial development.

· Flexible, remote working with a supportive and collaborative team.

· Training and development in data, AI, and modern project delivery approaches.

· Clear opportunity to grow into a more senior commercial or leadership role over time.

Experience Required:

· Sales experience: minimum 4 years

· Apprenticeship experience: desirable

Benefits:

· Flexible Remote Working

· Uncapped Bonus

· Pension Scheme

· Enhanced Annual Leave

· Paid Sick Leave

· Volunteer Days

· Eye Care Support

· Retail Discounts

· Railcard (Eligibility Dependent)

Job Types: Full-time, Permanent

Pay: £40,000.00-£45,000.00 per year

Benefits:

Company pension
Employee discount
Flexitime
Sick pay
Work from home

Projecting Success stands out because the brief combines new business, client development, and team leadership in a specialist market that values both pace and substance.

personalisedContent.heroPositioning: Commercial growth with disciplined delivery, stakeholder confidence, and a practical grip on performance.
personalisedContent.personalisedOpening: I bring a background in operations, transformation, and performance improvement, and I’m looking for a role where commercial growth and structured follow-through matter just as much as opening doors. Projecting Success stands out because the brief combines new business, client development, and team leadership in a specialist market that values both pace and substance.
personalisedContent.whyThisCompany: Projecting Success works in a focused space that combines data, AI, advanced analytics, and project delivery. I’m drawn to the fact that the business is scaling while investing in commercial capability, new revenue streams, and development for future-ready teams.
personalisedContent.whyThisRole: This role fits the kind of step-up I’m looking for because it goes beyond individual selling. I’d be contributing to pipeline growth, client conversations, and commercial discipline, while also helping a small team build confidence and consistency.

selectedEvidenceExamples.bestMatchedRoleNeed: Commercial awareness and operating in a growth environment
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: I led day-to-day operations during a scale-up phase, so I understand the pressure of growing a business without losing control of delivery. The commercial improvement in margin and orders won shows I can work in an environment where performance has to keep moving.
selectedEvidenceExamples.suggestedUsage: Use as a supporting example for growth mindset and commercial discipline.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I’ve worked in a business that had to grow without losing grip on delivery.

selectedEvidenceExamples.exampleTitle: Complex annual projects and team leadership
selectedEvidenceExamples.bestMatchedRoleNeed: Team leadership, stakeholder coordination, and service discipline
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: I managed and supported a team through business-critical annual work in a sensitive, regulated environment. That gives me a strong base for leading account managers, keeping standards high, and staying organised when priorities shift.
selectedEvidenceExamples.suggestedUsage: Use as the clearest evidence for people leadership and structured execution.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I’ve led teams through high-pressure work while keeping service standards intact.

selectedEvidenceExamples.bestMatchedRoleNeed: Commercial performance, reporting, and financial control
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: I’ve helped improve profit, working capital, and cash performance in a role where tighter control mattered. That matters here because the role needs someone who can manage pipeline and commercial performance with real discipline.
selectedEvidenceExamples.suggestedUsage: Use as a proof point for commercial awareness and reporting credibility.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I’m comfortable working with numbers, control, and performance improvement.

personalisedContent.roleNeedsSummary: My read is that this role needs someone who can win work, keep a pipeline moving, and handle senior conversations without losing the detail. It also needs someone who can bring order to commercial activity, support a small team, and learn a specialist offer quickly enough to sell it credibly.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Winning new business and converting opportunities
experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve worked in a scale-up environment where growth depended on better execution, stronger performance, and commercial discipline.
experienceMappings.relevance: It shows I understand the pressure behind growth, not just the target itself.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Developing client relationships and stakeholder confidence
experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve coordinated work across a team in a regulated, high-trust setting where service standards and communication had to stay consistent.
experienceMappings.relevance: That translates well to client conversations and relationship management.

experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve worked with reporting, financial control, and working-capital improvement, which means I’m comfortable keeping a close eye on performance and follow-through.
experienceMappings.relevance: This role needs commercial discipline, not just activity.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Leading and developing a small team
experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve supported a 12-person function through demanding annual work, balancing workload, training, and service delivery.
experienceMappings.relevance: That gives me a practical base for helping account managers improve consistency and confidence.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Comfort with technical or data-led services
experienceMappings.myEvidence: My background includes regulated data services, and I’ve also worked in environments where reporting and structured information were central to delivery.
experienceMappings.relevance: I’d be comfortable learning the technical side of the offer and explaining it clearly to clients.

experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve helped deliver a £149.9k improvement in profit before appropriation, released £33.3k of working capital, and improved cash at bank year on year.
experienceMappings.relevance: That shows I’m used to working with performance data in a practical way.

focusAreasToBring.title: New business with structure
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would focus on building a pipeline that is active, qualified, and properly managed, not just busy.

focusAreasToBring.title: Client conversations that land
focusAreasToBring.summary: I’d keep my approach practical: understand the need, shape the offer clearly, and move conversations forward with discipline.

focusAreasToBring.title: Support for a small team
focusAreasToBring.summary: I’d help create clarity around priorities, standards, and follow-through so the team can perform consistently.

personalisedContent.fitSummary: I’m a strong fit because I bring commercial discipline, stakeholder confidence, and a track record of improving performance in complex environments. I haven’t built my career in one narrow sales lane, but I have worked in roles where results depended on structure, judgement, and getting people aligned around a clear outcome.
personalisedContent.likelyContributionSummary: Based on what the brief describes, I’d expect to spend the first 6-12 months building a reliable pipeline, sharpening how opportunities are qualified, and helping turn interest into revenue. I’d also look to support the account management team with clearer priorities, stronger follow-through, and more consistent commercial habits.
companyHighlights: Projecting Success works across infrastructure, defence, construction, and technology.
The business combines consultancy, apprenticeship delivery, and strategic partnerships.
It is investing in commercial capability as it scales.
The role includes remote working and flexitime.
There is clear scope to grow into a more senior commercial or leadership role.
personalisedContent.cultureFitSummary: I work best where I’m trusted to get on with the job, but still held to clear standards. The remote, collaborative setup in the brief feels like a good match for how I work: independent, organised, and direct.

first90DaysPlan.focus: Understand the offer and the pipeline
first90DaysPlan.detail: I’d get close to the services, the current commercial priorities, and the shape of the pipeline so I can speak about the offer with confidence and spot where momentum is strongest.
I’d focus on targeted outreach, stronger qualification, and tighter follow-through on live opportunities, while getting a clear view of how the team is working today.

first90DaysPlan.focus: Strengthen team support and commercial consistency
first90DaysPlan.detail: I’d look to improve the cadence around reporting, forecasting, and client activity, while helping the account managers build confidence in their own conversations and next steps.

personalisedContent.closingSummary: I’d bring a practical commercial style, a steady hand with performance, and the kind of follow-through this growth role needs.
closingProofPoints: I helped deliver a £149.9k improvement in profit before appropriation.
I supported a 60% rise in orders won during a scale-up phase.
I managed a 12-person function through business-critical work in a regulated environment.
contentNotes: I have not claimed direct apprenticeship sales or DfE funding experience because that is not supported by the CV or evidence bank.
I have used operations and transformation evidence to support a commercial leadership case, since the available evidence is stronger there than in pure sales roles.
Company highlights are limited to facts stated in the advert.
